topic.title: Introduction to the Argus C3 Camera
topic.shortdesc: This will serve as a guide to the Argus C3 rangefinder camera and theory in operation.

body.p: The Argus C3 is a legendary 35mm rangefinder camera from WW2. Today it's a bit of an oddity among camera enthusiasts but remains a very capable camera even among the more well-known choices of the era. The following will be a guide to the theory and usage of the Argus C3 rangefinder camera.
